set_climate_schedule.name: Set climate schedule
set_climate_schedule.description: Set one or more timed climate pre-conditioning schedules. Each call replaces all existing schedules; send an empty controls list to cancel all.

controls.name: Controls
controls.description: List of schedule entries. Each entry must contain: mode (cold/hot/wind), on (1/0), operate (manual/auto/close), set_id, start_time (epoch ms as string), windlevel (1-7), days (list of ints, 0=Sun..6=Sat, empty=once), circle (in/out), position (all), wshld (0/1).

vin.name: VIN
vin.description: Vehicle identification number. Required when multiple vehicles are configured.

cancel_climate_schedule.name: Cancel climate schedule
cancel_climate_schedule.description: Cancel all active climate pre-conditioning schedules.

vin.name: VIN
vin.description: Vehicle identification number. Required when multiple vehicles are configured.

set_charge_schedule.name: Set charge schedule
set_charge_schedule.description: Set the vehicle charge schedule (start time, end time, target SOC, and repeat days).

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the charge schedule is active.

cycles.name: Cycles
cycles.description: Comma-separated day numbers to repeat on, e.g. "1,2,3,4,5" for weekdays. Empty string for a one-off schedule.

vin.name: VIN
vin.description: Vehicle identification number. Required when multiple vehicles are configured.

fota_schedule.name: Schedule firmware update
fota_schedule.description: Schedule a queued FOTA firmware update for installation at a specific time.

task_id.name: Task ID
task_id.description: FOTA task identifier returned by the firmware download step.

vin.name: VIN
vin.description: Vehicle identification number. Required when multiple vehicles are configured.
